'''Drooim-Durtha Systems''' was a manufacturing company. During the early [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], they contracted [[Neb Ufentes]] to design and create a [[Homing beacon/Legends|subspace tracking device]] known as [[ShipFinder]].<ref name="Counterstrike" />
